eas_text: A civil authority has issued A MISSING AND ENDANGERED PERSON ALERT for the following counties or areas: Boone; Gallatin; Grant; Kenton; Campbell, KY; at 06:17 PM ON MAR 13, 2026 Effective until 10:17 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: An IAN Alert has been issued for Jenny Dim a 9- year-old Asian Female last seen in Boone Co Kentucky on 03/13/2026 at approximately 5pm. Jenny Dim is described as 4'4" 53 lbs and wearing A Mint color jacket Pink shirt Pink headphones and no shoes. Stay tuned to local media for more information.
